brief_notes: Well-structured long-form paper with Related Work, Methods with equations, Results organized by claims, and Discussion. Key numbers (210-dim, 251 CATH domains, 44-854 residues, CPE 1s vs TM-Vec 67s, 59.2-81.5% range, ARI 0.95/1.00/0.87/0.49/0.73/0.56, 143 spikes with 80/31/32 split, 4405 models across 28 families, 125869/111349/13431 pair counts, 96% of 210 types, p<10^-16, RT=0.582, 30 shells at 0.75A, 167 atom types, 65 antihypertensive drugs) all match extraction. 4 figures with schematic captions present. One minor issue: summary tables give 'approaching 100%' rather than precise values (acceptable as the extraction also uses this phrasing). Good interpretive discussion with limitations section.
